overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit medieval Middle Eastern city. The character traverses open courtyards, covered walkways with flowering vines, and market areas with sandstone architecture and Islamic design elements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through sunlit courtyard toward a wooden arbor entrance

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking parallel to ego on the left side

entered.detail: tall stone tower with multiple balconies rising above the courtyard
tan stone structures with arched windows and Islamic architectural details
lattice wooden framework covered with flowering vines forming a covered walkway
dense bushes with vibrant blue flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit courtyard with a prominent minaret visible in the distance. The character walks toward a wooden arbor entrance flanked by blue flowering bushes, with sandstone buildings lining the sides. A few robed NPCs walk through the space.

events.description: enters wooden arbor with lattice roof creating dappled shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arbor passage with flowering vines overhead

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead through the arbor

entered.detail: overhead wooden trellis structure creating patterned shadows on the ground
large green painted wooden door at the end of the passage
colorful woven rugs laid out on the ground near the exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered walkway with a wooden lattice roof overhead, creating dappled light patterns on the cobblestone path. Blue flowering vines cover the arbor sides, and the passage leads toward a green doorway with carpets displayed at the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with carpet merchant and pottery

events.description: exits arbor into enclosed courtyard with pottery and carpet displays

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow courtyard past merchants and pottery displays

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures conversing near the pottery stall

entered.detail: large terracotta urns and vases arranged outside a shop
trees with bright pink blossoms visible beyond the courtyard
large wooden wheeled cart with tattered canvas covering
wooden scaffolding structure against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the arbor, the character enters a narrower courtyard filled with merchant displays including large clay pots and carpets. The space opens toward an area with pink flowering trees, and bamboo scaffolding is visible along the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairs to lower market courtyard

events.description: descends stone staircase into lower courtyard
character turns around to face opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs through market area, then turning around near guards

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms standing near a banner

entered.detail: market stall displaying various clay pots and ceramics on the ground
tall vertical red banner with gold emblem hanging from building
large building with prominent green dome and Islamic architecture

segments.scene_description: The character descends a stone staircase into a lower open courtyard with a pottery vendor stall. Guards in red uniforms stand near a large red banner. The character continues walking then turns around, with a prominent green-domed building now visible in the distance.

events.description: enters open plaza with clear view of green dome

agents.ego_description: walking toward the green-domed building through the sunlit plaza

entered.detail: stone seating with blue cushion along the path
ornate arched entrance to the domed building

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through an open plaza toward the green-domed building, which grows larger as the character approaches. The area features stone benches, palm trees, and sandstone architecture with minimal crowd presence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval city, transitioning from a bright open courtyard into shaded walkways and finally toward a grand domed landmark. It begins by following the character through a sandstone courtyard toward a wooden arbor flanked by blue flowering bushes, with a distant minaret framing the horizon. As the character enters the arbor, the scene shifts into a semi-covered walkway where a lattice roof casts dappled light over the cobblestones before opening into a narrow merchant area filled with clay pots and pink flowering trees. The camera then descends a stone staircase past red-uniformed guards and a large banner, turning to reveal a prominent green-domed building in the distance. Finally, the view expands across an open plaza with palm trees and stone benches as the character walks steadily toward the looming green dome.
